name: Cherry Almond Nanaimo Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook butter, sugar, cocoa, vanilla, and egg in a saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly until the custard begins to thicken. Remove from heat and stir in coconut, crumbs, and almonds. Pat firmly into a greased 9-inch square pan. Chill for 1 hour.
2. Cream butter, cherry juice, and extract. Gradually beat in icing sugar to make a smooth spreading consistency. Stir in cherries. Spread over the base and chill until firm.
3. Heat chocolate and butter, stirring until smoothly melted. Drizzle chocolate over filling. Chill. Cut into bars. YIELD: 30 BARS
